spec.description: Total DNS queries processed
spec.title: Total Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question_name, question_type, result_status, response_from | result_status != `not blocked` | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{ .endpoint | trimPrefix "${endpoint_prefix}" }}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}","status":"{{.result_status}}","provider":"{{.response_from}}"}`

spec.description: Queries with a notable status: blocked, worker blocked, possibly blocked, worker allowed, or error
spec.title: Recent Notable Queries

spec.description: Average queries per minute by endpoint
spec.title: Query Statistics by Endpoint

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json question_name, result_status | result_status=~`blocked|possibly blocked` [$__range])))

spec.description: Most blocked domains across all providers
spec.title: Top Blocked Domains

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json result_status, response_from | result_status = `blocked` | response_from !~ `config|error|blocklist-loading|rebind-protection|cache` [$__range])) by (response_from)

spec.description: Which DNS provider's response was used for blocked queries
spec.title: Blocked by Provider

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider timed out
spec.title: Timed Out Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question_name, question_type, timed_out_providers | timed_out_providers != "" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{ .endpoint | trimPrefix "${endpoint_prefix}" }}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider timed out
spec.title: Recent Timed Out Queries

spec.description: Queries blocked by local config (BLOCKED_DOMAINS) or community block list
spec.title: Worker Blocked Queries

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json question_name, result_status | result_status=`worker blocked` [$__range])))

spec.description: Most queried domains blocked by local config
spec.title: Top Worker-Blocked Domains

spec.description: Queries blocked by at least one upstream DNS provider
spec.title: Provider Blocked Queries

spec.description: Queries allowed by local config (ALLOWED_DOMAINS)
spec.title: Worker Allowed Queries

spec.expr: topk(15, sum by (question_name) (count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json question_name, result_status | result_status=`worker allowed` [$__range])))

spec.description: Most queried domains allowed by local config
spec.title: Top Config-Allowed Domains

spec.description: Queries where all upstream DNS providers failed
spec.title: Provider Error Queries

spec.description: Queries where rebind protection was triggered
spec.title: Rebind Protected Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question_name, question_type, rebind_providers | rebind_providers != "" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{ .endpoint | trimPrefix "${endpoint_prefix}" }}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where rebind protection was triggered
spec.title: Recent Rebind Protected Queries

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider failed
spec.title: Failed Provider Queries

spec.description: Queries possibly blocked by an upstream DNS provider (NXDOMAIN)
spec.title: Provider Possibly Blocked Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question_name, question_type, failed_providers | failed_providers != `` | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{ .endpoint | trimPrefix "${endpoint_prefix}" }}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}","failed_providers":"{{.failed_providers}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider failed
spec.title: Recent Failed Provider Queries

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider was retried
spec.title: Retried Provider Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json retried_providers, endpoint, question_name, question_type | retried_providers != `` | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{ .endpoint | trimPrefix "${endpoint_prefix}" }}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}","retried_providers":"{{.retried_providers}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider was retried
spec.title: Recent Retried Provider Queries

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider had a connection error
spec.title: Connection Error Queries

spec.expr: {source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, question_name, question_type, connection_error_providers | connection_error_providers != "" | line_format `{"endpoint":"{{ .endpoint | trimPrefix "${endpoint_prefix}" }}","domain":"{{.question_name}}","type":"{{.question_type}}","connection_error_providers":"{{.connection_error_providers}}"}`

spec.description: Queries where at least one upstream DNS provider had a connection error
spec.title: Recent Connection Error Queries

spec.description: Queries resolved internally without reaching an upstream DNS provider
spec.title: Internal Resolution

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json result_status, response_from | result_status = `possibly blocked` | response_from !~ `config|error|blocklist-loading|rebind-protection|cache` [$__range])) by (response_from)

spec.description: Which DNS provider's response was used for possibly blocked queries
spec.title: Possibly Blocked by Provider

spec.description: Overall distribution of query outcomes
spec.title: Query Status Distribution

spec.description: Queries not blocked by any upstream DNS provider
spec.title: Provider Not Blocked Queries

spec.description: DNS queries answered from the Cloudflare Cache API, skipping upstream provider fanout
spec.title: Cache Hits

spec.description: Queries served while the KV community blocklist was still loading
spec.title: Blocklist Loading Queries

spec.description: Query volume distribution across client IPs
spec.title: All Queries by Client

spec.description: Blocked query distribution across client IPs
spec.title: Blocked by Client

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json client_ip, result_status | result_status = `possibly blocked` [$__range])) by (client_ip)

spec.description: Possibly blocked query distribution across client IPs
spec.title: Possibly Blocked by Client

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json client_ip, result_status | result_status = `worker blocked` [$__range])) by (client_ip)

spec.description: Worker-blocked (config) query distribution across client IPs
spec.title: Worker Blocked by Client

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json client_ip, result_status | result_status = `worker allowed` [$__range])) by (client_ip)

spec.description: Worker-allowed (bypass) query distribution across client IPs
spec.title: Worker Allowed by Client

spec.description: DNS query volume over time, broken down by status
spec.title: Query Volume by Status

spec.description: Error query distribution across client IPs
spec.title: Error by Client

spec.description: Total number of domains in the loaded KV community blocklist
spec.title: Blocklist Size

spec.description: Percentage of queries blocked by providers or worker config (blocked + worker blocked) over the selected time range
spec.title: Queries Blocked %

spec.description: DNS query volume over time broken down by client IP
spec.title: Client Activity Over Time

spec.description: Worker request latency from receipt to Loki dispatch
spec.title: Request Latency

spec.description: Query volume distribution across endpoints
spec.title: All Queries by Endpoint

spec.description: Blocked query distribution across endpoints
spec.title: Blocked by Endpoint

spec.expr: label_replace(sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, result_status | result_status = `possibly blocked` [$__range])) by (endpoint), "endpoint", "$1", "endpoint", "${endpoint_prefix}(.*)")

spec.description: Possibly blocked query distribution across endpoints
spec.title: Possibly Blocked by Endpoint

spec.expr: label_replace(sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, result_status | result_status = `worker blocked` [$__range])) by (endpoint), "endpoint", "$1", "endpoint", "${endpoint_prefix}(.*)")

spec.description: Worker-blocked (config) query distribution across endpoints
spec.title: Worker Blocked by Endpoint

spec.expr: label_replace(sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json endpoint, result_status | result_status = `worker allowed` [$__range])) by (endpoint), "endpoint", "$1", "endpoint", "${endpoint_prefix}(.*)")

spec.description: Worker-allowed (bypass) query distribution across endpoints
spec.title: Worker Allowed by Endpoint

spec.description: Error query distribution across endpoints
spec.title: Error by Endpoint

spec.description: Distribution of DNS query types
spec.title: Query Types Distribution

spec.description: Top queried domains
spec.title: Top 20 Queried Domains

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({source="cloudflare-doh-worker"} | json result_status, response_from | result_status = `not blocked` | response_from !~ `config|error|blocklist-loading|rebind-protection|cache` [$__range])) by (response_from)

spec.description: Which DNS provider's response was used for non-blocked queries
spec.title: Allowed by Provider
